plot_frame_box.description: Pixel bounding box of the visible plot region in image.png. Origin (0,0) is the top-left of the image; y grows downward. 'offset' is the top-left corner of the box in image coordinates; 'size' is its width and height in pixels. Detected by finding the y-axis line (left), x-axis line (bottom), and the bounding box of non-white pixels inside the L-shaped quadrant (top, right).

pixels_per_coordinate_unit.description: How many image pixels equal one unit of x or y in data coordinates.

data_to_pixel_formula.explanation: Convert any (x, y) data coordinate to a (col, row) pixel coordinate in image.png. Derived from the linear axis calibration fit during extraction.

worked_example.scenario: Top of the 27°C GC1 bar (mean duration 7.485 days).
worked_example.verification: This (col, row) should land on top of the dark-blue middle bar.
